_comment: Company dedup/hierarchy rules for the ngAbs play. SME-cited mappings + general exact-dup detection. The runner writes staging labels only (prep_dedup_*); nothing is deleted. Rules are the current iteration — surfaced as labels for operator review, not silently merged.

mappings.cite: client SME gold: LSNE no longer independent -> PCI (domain in use is pci.com; no separate PCI row in batch)
client SME 2026-06-05: ProBio = GenScript ProBio (already consolidated in this batch)

hierarchy.cite: client SME gold: SK pharmteco is the parent of KBI Biopharma (keep both, do not collapse)
